---
title: "Offset Headings"
subtitle: "Quarto Extension"
author: "Mickaël Canouil"
format: html
filters:
  - offset-headings
---

## Basic Usage

Apply the filter using the `offset-headings` class:

::: {.offset-headings}
This content will be processed by the filter.
:::

## With Options

Pass options as attributes:

::: {.offset-headings option1="value1"}
This content has custom options applied.
:::

## Multiple Options

Combine multiple options:

::: {.offset-headings option1="value1" option2="value2"}
This content has multiple options applied.
:::

## Nested Content

The filter handles nested content:

::: {.offset-headings}
### Heading Inside Filter

- List item 1.
- List item 2.

Paragraph with **bold** and *italic* text.
:::
